response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches 'The Biggest Dreamer' (Hololive cover) for the first segment and a second song ('Trust Me') for the final segment. A skit featuring Indonesian dialogue and Morse code reading occupies the middle section. I used the on-screen text to confirm the correct transcription of the Indonesian lines and the Morse code sequence (C-H-A-M-O-N-Y-A). Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio, and mid-sentence pauses in the skit have been handled by splitting the text into discrete blocks to ensure precision.

subtitles.original: BIG AND BIG AND BIGGEST DREAMER
subtitles.english: BIG AND BIG AND BIGGEST DREAMER
I'll show you I can fly

subtitles.original: BIG AND BIG AND BIGGEST DREAMER
subtitles.english: BIG AND BIG AND BIGGEST DREAMER
both the future and the now,

subtitles.original: Buset, ini sih bener-bener udah keterlaluan.
subtitles.english: Darn, this is really over the top.
I was supposed to be doing my 3D showcase now,

subtitles.original: tapi malah nyasar, kejebak di ruangan yang ada bomnya,
subtitles.english: but I got lost and trapped in a room with a bomb,
and I'm told to decipher Morse code.
What am I supposed to do?

subtitles.original: Telepon YAGOO terus bilang aku nyasar dan perlu bantuan?
subtitles.english: Call YAGOO and tell him I'm lost and need help?

subtitles.original: Wait, kayaknya aku tahu harus ngapain!
subtitles.english: Wait, I think I know what to do!

subtitles.original: Aku nyasar, kejebak, terus ada bom juga.
subtitles.english: I'm lost and I'm trapped with a bomb.

subtitles.original: Kalau kamu nggak bisa mecahin kode morse, bisa mampus aku.
subtitles.english: I hope you can solve a Morse code or it's so over.

subtitles.original: Garis titik garis, titik titik titik, titik dot, garis garis, garis garis garis, titik dot, garis titik garis, titik dot.
subtitles.english: Dash-dot-dash, dot-dot-dot, dot-dash, dash-dash, dash-dash-dash, dot-dot, dash-dot-dash, dot-dash.

subtitles.original: Garis titik garis, titik titik titik, titik dash, garis garis, garis garis garis, titik dot, garis titik garis, titik dot.
subtitles.english: Dash-dot-dash, dot-dot-dot, dot-dash, dash-dash, dash-dash-dash, dot-dot, dash-dot-dash, dot-dash.
I think I'm gonna die for real.
I think the last one is Y... A...

subtitles.original: Aku nggak tahu kamu lagi ngapain, tapi semoga berhasil!
subtitles.english: I don't know what you're doing, but good luck!

subtitles.original: ちゃ、ちゃちゃもんじゃ……
I really want to be with you
subtitles.english: I really want to be with you

subtitles.original: I really wanna really wanna be with you
subtitles.english: I really wanna really wanna be with you

subtitles.original: You're my love, you're my star, you're my dear
subtitles.english: You're my love, you're my star, you're my dear

subtitles.original: So trust me, trust me, trust me, yeah
subtitles.english: So trust me, trust me, trust me, yeah

subtitles.original: いつでもそばにいるから
subtitles.english: I'll always be by your side

subtitles.original: Trust me もう何も恐れないで
subtitles.english: Trust me, don't be afraid of anything anymore

subtitles.original: My dear 見えない糸で
subtitles.english: My dear, with an invisible thread

subtitles.original: Trust me 繋がっているから
subtitles.english: Trust me, because we are connected

subtitles.original: ただ感じていて この温もり
ちゃんと聞こえている
僕が包み込んであげる
subtitles.english: I will embrace it for you
I want to tell you over and over

subtitles.original: 愛はきっとここにある

subtitles.english: It's okay to lean on me

subtitles.original: そのすべてを受け止めると決めた
subtitles.english: I've decided to accept all of it

subtitles.original: I'm here どこにいたって
subtitles.english: I'm here, no matter where you are

subtitles.original: Call me 一つになれる
subtitles.english: Call me, we can become one

subtitles.original: Trust me この想い解けないから
subtitles.english: Trust me, because this feeling won't unravel
My dear, the burden you carry

subtitles.original: Trust me 降ろしてみればいい
subtitles.english: Trust me, you should try setting it down

subtitles.original: そう君のために 僕がいるんだ
subtitles.english: Yes, I am here for your sake

subtitles.original: Really want to be with you
subtitles.english: Really want to be with you

subtitles.original: Trust me, trust me, trust me, yeah

subtitles.english: have you kept locked in your chest?

subtitles.original: 君を変えてゆけるはず
subtitles.english: should be able to change you
Even if things are taken away

subtitles.original: 大事なのは自分らしくいること
subtitles.english: What's important is staying true to yourself

subtitles.original: I'm here たとえ世界が
subtitles.english: I'm here, even if the world

Trust me 繋いだ手 離さないから
